synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20950 Oracle Linux 9 nftables bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20950
description:
[[1.0.9-5.el9]]
- tests: py: missing json output in never merge across non-expression statements (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: py: add missing json.output data (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: py: remove huge-limit test cases (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- datatype: rt_symbol_table_init() to search for iproute2 configs (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: shell: connect chains to hook point (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: shell: Fix sets/reset_command_0 for current kernels (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20950

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20950.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
nftables-1.0.9-5.el9_7.i686.rpm
nftables-1.0.9-5.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
nftables-devel-1.0.9-5.el9_7.i686.rpm
nftables-devel-1.0.9-5.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
python3-nftables-1.0.9-5.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
nftables-1.0.9-5.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
nftables-devel-1.0.9-5.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
python3-nftables-1.0.9-5.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/nftables-1.0.9-5.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[[1.0.9-5.el9]]
- tests: py: missing json output in never merge across non-expression statements (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: py: add missing json.output data (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: py: remove huge-limit test cases (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- datatype: rt_symbol_table_init() to search for iproute2 configs (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: shell: connect chains to hook point (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
- tests: shell: Fix sets/reset_command_0 for current kernels (Phil Sutter) [RHEL-114095]
